svg.text: Brownfield: goals → research (optional) → requirements → roadmap → auto-advance to plan-phase
steps 1–4 · read project history, gather intent, lock version
read PROJECT.md, MILESTONES.md, STATE.md · check for MILESTONE-CONTEXT.md (from /nf:discuss-milestone)
if MILESTONE-CONTEXT.md exists: use it (confirm) · else: AskUserQuestion — "what do you want to build next?"
parse last version from MILESTONES.md · suggest next (v1.0 → v1.1, or v2.0 for major) · confirm with user
write Current Milestone section to PROJECT.md · reset STATE.md · delete MILESTONE-CONTEXT.md · commit
steps 5–6 · init models · research decision gate
AskUserQuestion: "Research domain ecosystem for new features?" → persisted to workflow.research config
Research first → Steps 7–8 · Skip research → jump directly to Step 9
steps 7–8 · optional path · skipped if "Skip research" chosen in step 6
Stack · Features · Architecture · Pitfalls → 4 nf-project-researcher agents spawn simultaneously
focus on NEW capabilities only (project history injected as "already built") · output: .planning/research/
nf-research-synthesizer reads STACK + FEATURES + ARCHITECTURE + PITFALLS → writes SUMMARY.md · commits
steps 9–12 · profile → baselines → scope per-category → commit
confirm existing profile from PROJECT.md · or pick: Web / Mobile / Desktop / API / CLI / Library
new milestone: load-baseline-requirements.cjs --profile → present with opt-out per category
existing baselines: carry forward (confirm or re-review opt-outs) · cross-cutting quality gates
present features by category (from research or conversation) · AskUserQuestion scope per-category · identify gaps
write REQUIREMENTS.md with REQ-IDs (CAT-01 format) · future + out-of-scope sections · commit
steps 13–16 · formal scan → roadmapper → user approval → commit
reads PROJECT.md + REQUIREMENTS.md + SUMMARY.md + formal context · continues phase numbering from MILESTONES.md
derives phases → maps every req to exactly one phase → 2-5 success criteria each · writes ROADMAP + STATE + REQUIREMENTS
present phase table inline · AskUserQuestion: Approve / Adjust / Review full file
Adjust → user notes → re-spawn roadmapper with revision context → loop until Approve
commit ROADMAP.md + STATE.md + REQUIREMENTS.md (traceability section) · "docs: create milestone vX.Y roadmap"
if workflow.auto_advance=true: spawn plan-phase[N] → pipeline continues to planned first phase
if false: display "Next: /nf:discuss-phase [N] or /nf:plan-phase [N]" and stop
MILESTONE INITIALIZED · artifacts: PROJECT.md · research/ · REQUIREMENTS.md · ROADMAP.md
Brownfield equivalent of /nf:new-project · phase numbers continue from previous milestone · baselines carry forward idempotently
